text_block_list.text:
As I'm heading to the cafeteria for<n>lunch, I see
an Umamusume who, for<n>some reason, is staring
intently at the<n>other students as they eat.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Stare...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I am observing everyone's behavior.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Simply by observing these<n>mealtimes, I can
gain insight into<n>everyone's priorities. For
example...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Cake again, Creek? You might end up<n>regretting
those extra calories, you<n>know?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's lunchtime, after all. And they<n>do say
dessert is food for the soul.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You've barely had anything yourself,<n>Inari. You
only asked for a small<n>portion of soba. Is that
enough for<n>you?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Y-yep, it's plenty! Finishing soba<n>swiftly is
considered the epitome of<n>chic!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As you can see... for racers, even<n>daily meals are
an essential part of<n>training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Which means there must be various<n>approaches
to them. I wish to<n>understand and learn from
these<n>perspectives.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
At the dojo, it was commonplace to<n>learn by
watching other students train,<n>you see.
choice_data_list: So what's your own approach to meals?
So what's your own approach to meals?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I prioritize nutritional balance. I strive<n>not to
become too accustomed to<n>luxury or gourmet
foods.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, I imagine others have their<n>own ways
of thinking. And the more<n>exceptional the runner,
the more<n>steadfast her philosophies...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What's this?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm starving.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oguri... A top-notch talent, indeed. I<n>must carefully
observe her choices.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hmmm, what to choose, what to<n>choose?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Right. I'll start with the miso mackerel<n>set.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm, she chose the same meal I did.<n>Mackerel is
rich in nutrients, so I<n>assume Oguri must also
value hea—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ten portions should do it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely need some hamburger<n>steaks too.
Five plates of those. And<n>five portions of the
extra-large<n>katsudon. Oh, they have rice balls too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Those would go well with pickled<n>vegetables...
Hmmm, katsudon alone<n>just isn't enough fried
food... I'd<n>better grab some fried chicken too.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...I can't make sense of it! What could<n>possibly
compel Oguri to order such<n>copious—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah! Could it be?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Is she... using these meals as a way<n>to test her
limits?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That would explain why she's eating<n>so much!
Have I been underestimating<n>the significance of
meals all along?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I will not fall behind! I'll follow her<n>lead and go for
seconds!
choice_data_list:
Eating an amount that's right for you is probably
best...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu! The time has come to dig in!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! I'd like five more<n>portions of the
tatsuta fried chicken<n>and three more of the ginger
pork set!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're going in for more too, Yaeno?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oguri. You have opened my eyes.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Not even my stomach can be allowed<n>to lag
behind! I must catch up!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What? Catch up? Ketchup...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I should try some on my fried<n>chicken. And I'm
ordering some of<n>that ginger pork too.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You're right... I, too, have my own<n>thoughts
and reasoning behind my<n>meal choices...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to martial arts,<n>wavering and
being fickle achieves<n>nothing... I almost strayed
from my<n>path and lost sight of myself there.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... That said...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Hm... Now what about dessert?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'll have donuts, cheese tarts,<n>crepes... And I'll
throw some fruits in<n>for a refreshing touch...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oguri is truly to be feared. Her meal<n>choices
alone shake me to my core. I<n>have much to
learn...
